title: Make a polite request
subtitle: Ask without sounding too direct.
overview: A2 Core builds practical control: daily tasks, simple stories, short writing, listening repair, and clearer spoken output.

sections.title: A2 core focus
rows: Could you send me the address again?
你能再把地址发给我吗？
Would you mind speaking a little more slowly?
Could you send me the address again?
你能再把地址发给我吗？
Sure, I will send it now.

items.en: Could you send me the address again?
items.zh: 你能再把地址发给我吗？

items.en: Would you mind speaking a little more slowly?
Could you send me the address again?
items.zh: 你能再把地址发给我吗？

items.en: Sure, I will send it now.
This is practical A2 English I can use in real life.
items.zh: 这是我能在真实生活中使用的实用 A2 英语。

items.en: I will change the details and say it about myself.
items.zh: 我会改变细节，说成关于我自己的内容。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Could you send me the address again?
lines.zh: 你能再把地址发给我吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Sure, I will send it now.

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you give one more useful detail?
lines.zh: 你能再给一个有用的细节吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Would you mind speaking a little more slowly?

items.en: Could you send me the address again?
items.zh: 你能再把地址发给我吗？

items.en: Would you mind speaking a little more slowly?
Make a new version with your own place, time, or reason.
items.zh: 用你自己的地点、时间或原因造一个新版本。

items.en: Read it aloud until it sounds calm and natural.
items.zh: 大声朗读，直到听起来平稳自然。
